title: hydrocotyle ranunculoides var. sibthorpioides
intro: Hydrocotyle ranunculoides var. sibthorpioides, also known as Indian pennywort or brahmi, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cognitive-enhancing properties. The health benefits of Indian pennywort include reducing stress and anxiety, improving memory and cognitive function, and supporting liver and kidney health. Indian pennywort is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani herbal preparations to promote overall well-being and longevity.
